name: Steam and Air-Conditioning Supply
rationale: VN hierarchy 9.50 (utility is direct asset buyer) combined with highest ODI of the hydronic group (5.71) on billing accuracy (Opp=15) and zero drift (Opp=15). EU EED regulatory tailwind and multi-jet impeller replacement cycles (5-6 years) create a clear TCO displacement case; EN 1434/MID certification is the gating barrier for the billing segment.
entryStrategy: 1) Target Danish/German district operators (Kamstrup, Danfoss substation OEMs, Fernwarme Wien) for pilot. 2) Prove zero-drift thermal-energy accuracy in a 12-month control-loop trial. 3) Submit EN 1434/MID module-B+D certification in parallel. 4) Pitch multi-jet retrofit TCO once certified. 5) Scale via substation-package OEM channel.
